mapper.sql: a.id AS "id", a.title AS "title", a.content AS "content", a.lang AS "lang", a.sort AS "sort", a.create_date AS "createDate", a.update_date AS "updateDate"
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_faq( id, title, content, lang, sort, create_date, update_date ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{title}, #{content}, #{lang}, #{sort}, #{createDate}, #{updateDate} )
mapper.update: UPDATE t_faq SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, lang = #{lang}, sort = #{sort}, update_date = #{updateDate} WHERE id = #{id}
